opinion.h4: JENNINGS v. TEXAS. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF CRIMINAL APPEALS OF TEXAS. No. 717, Misc. Decided January 6, 1964.
opinion.p: Sidney E. Dawson, Townes L. Dawson and W. J. Durham for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
